raw_title: Automating Essential Work: News Media and Technology Hype in a Critical Sector 2014–2024
title_en: Automating Essential Work: News Media and Technology Hype in a Critical Sector 2014–2024
title_zh: 自动化关键工作：新闻媒体与技术炒作在一个关键领域 2014–2024
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了2014年至2024年间，新闻媒体如何应对自动化技术，并分析了相关技术炒作的影响。它关注自动化在关键工作领域的应用，以及媒体行业对此的反应和变化。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how news media has responded to automation technology from 2014 to 2024, analyzing the impact of related technology hype. It focuses on the application of automation in essential work areas and the reactions and changes within the media industry.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻媒体在技术变革中的角色，特别是自动化如何影响媒体工作流程和行业结构，以及技术炒作对公众认知和政策制定的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the role of news media in technological change, specifically how automation affects media workflows and industry structures, and the impact of technology hype on public perception and policy-making.
